## State location
State location is applicable only for solutions because modules are not deployed individually but as part of a solution.

| Region           | Bucket           | Key           |
|------------------|------------------|---------------|
| us-east-2 | hedgeserv-shd-lz-us-east-2-s3-tf-state | lz/ou/core/shd/pipelines/infra_image_factory_demo-app/terraform.tfstate |

## Inputs
Inputs are values that solution accepts and requires.

| Variable name    | Value type       | Default value | Required | Description |
|------------------|------------------|---------------|----------|-------------|
| account_id | string |  | false | Account ID. Default is to take it with tf data. |
| cb_credentials_type | none | SERVICE_ROLE | false | Set image_pull_credential_type to either CODEBUILD (standard image) or SERVICE_ROLE (custom image) |
| cb_name | string |  | false | Codebuild name. Default is to compose it from naming_prefix+cb_name_sfx |
| cb_name_sfx | string |  | false | Codebuild name suffix, it will be added to the naming_prefix. Default is to extract it from the folder name. |
| cb_role_name | string | InfrastructureCodeBuildCustomServiceRole | false | The role name that will compose the arn and passed to the codebuild. |
| cb_runtime_envs | map(string) | {} | false | The docker image runtime environemnt variables. |
| cb_runtime_image | string |  | false | The docker image that will be used by codebuild to start. |
| cb_runtime_image_name | string |  | false | The docker image that will be used by codebuild to start. |
| cb_runtime_image_name_sfx | string |  | false | The docker image suffix that will be used by codebuild to start. |
| cb_runtime_version | string | latest | false | The docker image version that will be by codebuild to start. |
| component | string | none | true | Module name or abbreviation |
| environment | string | none | true | Environment name or abbreviation |
| naming_prefix | string |  | false | The prefix that will be used for all resources created. Default is ou_environment_component_region. |
| org_id | string |  | false | Organization id. Default is to take it with tf data. |
| ou | string | none | true | Organization unit of the account |
| region | string |  | false | AWS region. Default is to take it with tf data. |
| solution_src_path | string | none | true | Relative path from top root of the project to current folder. |
| src_repo_location | string | none | true | Source git repository location. |
| src_repo_type | string | none | true | Source git repository type. |


## Outputs
Outputs include all the values that the solution provides to other modules or solutions.

| Name             | Value            | Description   |
|------------------|------------------|---------------|
| base_codebuild_project_name | none | Name of the CodeBuild project. |
| infa_image_ecr_id | none | Infra image ECR registry id. |
| infra_image_ecr_url | none | Infra image ECR registry url. |
| stage | none | none |
